channel.title: Usagi Electric
channel.description:
Welcome to Usagi Electric!
On this channel, we dive into old school technology, focusing heavily on vacuum tubes. My primary goal is to build computing circuits based off the legendary machines of yesteryear, only with a slight modern twist. All the tubes will be operating with very low voltages on the plate, making the projects safe and easy to follow along with. So, lets grab our multimeters, some random tubes and a low voltage power supply and have fun!
Usagi Electric covers one of my main passions, while my other main passion can be found over on Usagi Motors.
channel.itunes:author: Usagi Electric
channel.itunes:subtitle: Usagi Electric
channel.itunes:summary:
Welcome to Usagi Electric!
On this channel, we dive into old school technology, focusing heavily on vacuum tubes. My primary goal is to build computing circuits based off the legendary machines of yesteryear, only with a slight modern twist. All the tubes will be operating with very low voltages on the plate, making the projects safe and easy to follow along with. So, lets grab our multimeters, some random tubes and a low voltage power supply and have fun!
Usagi Electric covers one of my main passions, while my other main passion can be found over on Usagi Motors.

item.title: I Tried and Failed to Run a Simple Program…
item.description:
In the previous UE1 episode, I thought I had everything all wrapped up. It appeared to run the memory program with no problems, so I decided to run something a little more intense – Fibonacci. It’s still a simple program, but it hits all sorts of different parts of the computer and it went… poorly. Like dramatically poorly.
Silver lining though, I have an emulator for the computer now! https://github.com/Nakazoto/UEVTC/tree/main/UE1/Emulator
If you want to support the channel please hop over to Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/usagielectric
Also, we now have some epic shirts for sale! https://my-store-11554688.creator-spring.com
Come join us on Discord!
Discord: https://discord.gg/p7UsfHD
Intro Music adapted from: Artist: The Runaway Five Title: The Shinra Shuffle https://ocremix.org/remix/OCR01847
Thanks for watching!
Chapters 0:00 More than nothing, but less than something 1:02 Understanding the architecture 4:38 The Fibonacci sequence 6:47 The emulator 9:24 The assembler 11:50 And then it all goes terribly wrong… (CM) 14:58 Yup, still broken 19:34 The beard! No, not the beard! Anything but the beard! 21:42 Yup, still broken part three 23:06 Old man yells at clouds… 24:29 Happy kitty!
item.itunes:author: Usagi Electric
item.itunes:subtitle: I Tried and Failed to Run a Simple Program…
item.itunes:summary:
In the previous UE1 episode, I thought I had everything all wrapped up. It appeared to run the memory program with no problems, so I decided to run something a little more intense – Fibonacci. It’s still a simple program, but it hits all sorts of different parts of the computer and it went… poorly. Like dramatically poorly.
Silver lining though, I have an emulator for the computer now! https://github.com/Nakazoto/UEVTC/tree/main/UE1/Emulator
If you want to support the channel please hop over to Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/usagielectric
Also, we now have some epic shirts for sale! https://my-store-11554688.creator-spring.com
Come join us on Discord!
Discord: https://discord.gg/p7UsfHD
Intro Music adapted from: Artist: The Runaway Five Title: The Shinra Shuffle https://ocremix.org/remix/OCR01847
Thanks for watching!
Chapters 0:00 More than nothing, but less than something 1:02 Understanding the architecture 4:38 The Fibonacci sequence 6:47 The emulator 9:24 The assembler 11:50 And then it all goes terribly wrong… (CM) 14:58 Yup, still broken 19:34 The beard! No, not the beard! Anything but the beard! 21:42 Yup, still broken part three 23:06 Old man yells at clouds… 24:29 Happy kitty!

item.title: The Astatic D-104 is the Most Beautiful Microphone Ever Made!
item.description:
Every once in a while, it’s good to take a break and just go on a fun little tangent, and that’s exactly what today is all about! This Astatic D-140 microphone has been hanging out in the background for years, so let’s finally pull it off the shelf, give it a clean and see if we can get it doing microphone things. Also, if you watch this video, you can see my terrible acting!
If you want to support the channel please hop over to Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/usagielectric
Also, we now have some epic shirts for sale! https://my-store-11554688.creator-spring.com
Come join us on Discord! Discord: https://discord.gg/p7UsfHD
Intro Music adapted from: Artist: The Runaway Five Title: The Shinra Shuffle https://ocremix.org/remix/OCR01847
Thanks for watching!
Chapters 0:00 The years is 1935… 1:44 Welcome to the Astatic D-104 4:58 Cracking it open 5:59 Let’s clean this thing up 10:47 Rewiring the mic to be 2-wire 12:35 Testing it on the scope first 13:30 It works! What next? 15:04 We are Belters! (CM) 16:15 This entire ending is recorded on the D-104 with no additional audio processing 18:22 We should all aspire to be as relaxed as this bun
item.itunes:author: Usagi Electric
item.itunes:subtitle: The Astatic D-104 is the Most Beautiful Microphone Ever Made!
item.itunes:summary:
Every once in a while, it’s good to take a break and just go on a fun little tangent, and that’s exactly what today is all about! This Astatic D-140 microphone has been hanging out in the background for years, so let’s finally pull it off the shelf, give it a clean and see if we can get it doing microphone things. Also, if you watch this video, you can see my terrible acting!
If you want to support the channel please hop over to Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/usagielectric
Also, we now have some epic shirts for sale! https://my-store-11554688.creator-spring.com

What next? 15:04 We are Belters! (CM) 16:15 This entire ending is recorded on the D-104 with no additional audio processing 18:22 We should all aspire to be as relaxed as this bun
